find_trigon.title: Locate the Ender Trigon in the End (three-headed dragon — look for its structure in deep outer islands)

trigon_prep.title: Prepare for the Ender Trigon — it has three heads with different attack types (void, ice, lightning)

subtitle.text: The Ender Dragon was the guard. The Ender Trigon is what the guard was guarding against.

description: The Ender Trigon is a three-headed dragon boss added by the Ender Trigon mod.
It spawns in the deep outer islands — past the Poise Forest, past the End Cities.
Look for its summoning structure: a ring of End pillars with a central altar.
- Void Head: fires void beams that deal massive damage through armor
- Ice Head: fires ice bolts that inflict slowness and freeze
- Lightning Head: fires lightning arcs that chain across platforms
Each head must be individually targeted and defeated.
When one head falls, the others become more aggressive.
The Trigon is a significantly harder fight than the standard Ender Dragon.
On defeat, the Trigon drops unique materials and a Baby Ender Trigon egg.
The baby can be tamed. It is a dragon companion.
→ Locate the Ender Trigon's summoning structure [check]
→ Prepare your loadout for three-head mechanics [check]
